category_sources: source_facts.description says imake is a build automation system written for X11; official X.Org release area lists imake as an X.Org utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies imake; official X.Org release filenames and repository path use imake.
docs_sources: Official X.Org util release index and freedesktop cgit repository are the best official documentation/source surfaces found; imake documentation is primarily shipped with source/man pages.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop cgit page for xorg/util/imake identifies the GitLab clone URL as https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/util/imake.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies X11 build automation; source_facts.executables include imake and related make/dependency utilities.
